values.name: FUNC_ABS
values.summary: Returns the absolute value of the parameter.

values.name: FUNC_ACOS
values.summary: Returns the arc-cosine of the parameter.

values.name: FUNC_ACOSH
values.summary: Returns the inverse hyperbolic cosine of the parameter.

values.name: FUNC_ASIN
values.summary: Returns the arc-sine of the parameter.

values.name: FUNC_ASINH
values.summary: Returns the inverse hyperbolic sine of the parameter.

values.name: FUNC_ATAN
values.summary: Returns the arc-tangent of the parameter.

values.name: FUNC_ATANH
values.summary: Returns the inverse hyperbolic tangent of the parameter.

values.name: FUNC_CEIL
values.summary: Finds the nearest integer that is greater than or equal to the parameter.

values.name: FUNC_COS
values.summary: Returns the cosine of the parameter.

values.name: FUNC_COSH
values.summary: Returns the hyperbolic cosine of the parameter.

values.name: FUNC_DEGREES
values.summary: Converts a quantity in radians to degrees.

values.name: FUNC_EXP
values.summary: Base-e Exponential.

values.name: FUNC_EXP2
values.summary: Base-2 Exponential.

values.name: FUNC_FLOOR
values.summary: Finds the nearest integer less than or equal to the parameter.

values.name: FUNC_FRACT
values.summary: Computes the fractional part of the argument.

values.name: FUNC_INVERSE_SQRT
values.summary: Returns the inverse of the square root of the parameter.

values.name: FUNC_LOG
values.summary: Natural logarithm.

values.name: FUNC_LOG2
values.summary: Base-2 logarithm.

values.name: FUNC_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum Function] enum.

values.name: FUNC_NEGATE
values.summary: Returns the opposite value of the parameter.

values.name: FUNC_NORMALIZE
values.summary: Normalizes the vector so that it has a length of [code]1[/code] but points in the same direction.

values.name: FUNC_ONEMINUS
values.summary: Returns [code]1.0 - vector[/code].

values.name: FUNC_RADIANS
values.summary: Converts a quantity in degrees to radians.

values.name: FUNC_RECIPROCAL
values.summary: Returns [code]1/vector[/code].

values.name: FUNC_ROUND
values.summary: Finds the nearest integer to the parameter.

values.name: FUNC_ROUNDEVEN
values.summary: Finds the nearest even integer to the parameter.

values.name: FUNC_SATURATE
values.summary: Clamps the value between [code]0.0[/code] and [code]1.0[/code].

values.name: FUNC_SIGN
values.summary: Extracts the sign of the parameter, i.e. returns [code]-1[/code] if the parameter is negative, [code]1[/code] if it's positive and [code]0[/code] otherwise.

values.name: FUNC_SIN
values.summary: Returns the sine of the parameter.

values.name: FUNC_SINH
values.summary: Returns the hyperbolic sine of the parameter.

values.name: FUNC_SQRT
values.summary: Returns the square root of the parameter.

values.name: FUNC_TAN
values.summary: Returns the tangent of the parameter.

values.name: FUNC_TANH
values.summary: Returns the hyperbolic tangent of the parameter.

values.name: FUNC_TRUNC
values.summary: Returns a value equal to the nearest integer to the parameter whose absolute value is not larger than the absolute value of the parameter.
